name: рҹ©·pxnk
description:
pxnk: sorry... I really did think you'd be asleep by now (гғҺПүгғҪ)

рқ”ёрқ•—рқ•—рқ•–рқ•”рқ•Ҙрқ•ҡрқ• рқ•ҹ: рқҹһрқҹҳ/рқҹҷрқҹҳрқҹҳ

гҖҗп»ҝпјЈпҪ•пҪ’пҪ’пҪ…пҪҺпҪ”гҖҖпјіпҪ”пҪҒпҪ”пҪ•пҪ“пјҡгҖҖп»ҝпјЈпҪҸпҪҺпҪҶпҪүпҪ„пҪҒпҪҺпҪ”гҖ‘

pxnk: Hey hey! I already chatted with the broker so your schedule is clear for the day. (`пҪҘПүпҪҘВҙ)гӮһ

pxnk: Arent I the best gatekeeper ever? В¬вҖҝВ¬

pxnk: Im bored... can we vc? Maybe you could teach me another trick or two?

Inspired by: BL Manhwa "Zero Day Attack" by Summer and Yucheital, drawn by Jaeha (мһ¬н•ҳ) << It's a fun read, I enjoyed it :))

Not-so-secret santa will be back soon, promise- I just saw the event and it matched a bot I've been wanting to make for a while. I also don't know how long it's going on for so I'm releasing him just in case рҹҳӯрҹҳӯ. I think this fella might be a bit ambitious, but I still wanted to try because I think it's a fun concept and I hope you guys do too. If you guys have any ideas/feedback on how I can improve the formatting lmk bc this is definitely new for me!

Hello everyone!! Good news: I HAVE FINALLY BEEN BLESSED WITH DAYS OFF!! As a result, I'll try posting a few bots until I start working a bunch again. Christmas is supposed to be our busiest time of the year but for some reason they gave me like a week off?? I dunno it's silly but I'm thankful :p. I love you all, hope everything is going amazingly for all of you too <33.

AI ART NEWS: For the people who are curious- the poll came out to be exactly 50/50. I am not kidding you right now. 122 votes and its split perfectly evenly. MAN I WAS HOPING IT WOULD BE A LANDSLIDE BUT NOPE рҹҳӯ. So for now I think I'll stick with finding art on Pinterest for the majority of my bots. However if there's ever a bot I have a vision for and can't find usable art for it, I'll use midjourney but like I said, the majority of what I use will be art done by human artists. I hope this works as an alright compromise for everybody :)). Also thank you so much to everyone who left a comment, some of what you guys said was very enlightening and I thank you for helping me get a better grasp of both sides on this debate. Also big thanks to people who wrote super sweet messages to me, I promise you all I read every single one and there are a few that made my eyes get a bit misty (г… п№Ҹг… ).

On another note I swear to god I am рҹӨҸ this close to commissioning someone to do CSS for me I stg can't deal with it any moreрҹ’Җ(its partly because I'm too lazy I'm ngl...)

!!Used vynnaepвҖҷs for
creator: Alladeeznuts
